title: Exotic Egyptian Tomato Custard
description: A funky and tender Egyptian dish featuring confit tomatoes and a rich custard, perfect for a festive occasion, and keto friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, combine the eggs, heavy cream, granulated sweetener, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika, and blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into 6 ramekins or small baking dishes.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the ramekins.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the ramekins from the water bath and let them cool to room temperature.
Top each ramekin with a spoonful of confit tomatoes.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or overnight.
Serve the custard chilled, garnished with additional confit tomatoes if desired.
